name: Aditi Mehra
review: Absolutely loved the ambiance and the service. The food was authentic and flavorful!

name: Rahul Verma
review: A great place for family dinner. The biryani was perfectly spiced and the kebabs were juicy.

name: Sanya Kapoor
review: The decor is stunning, and the rooftop view made the experience unforgettable. Highly recommended!

name: Karan Desai
review: Friendly staff and quick service. Tried their Gujarati thali – it was amazing!

name: Neha Sharma
review: Every dish had a unique taste. The desserts were the highlight. Will visit again!

name: Vikram Reddy
review: Perfect weekend spot. Loved the seafood platter – fresh and well-prepared.

name: Priya Iyer
review: Very clean and cozy. The service was a bit slow, but the food made up for it.

name: Arjun Malhotra
review: The South Indian dishes here taste just like home. The dosa was crisp and the sambhar flavorful.

name: Meera Joshi
review: An excellent place to host a birthday. The staff made the event special!

name: Dev Singh
review: I wasn’t expecting such quality from a small place. Every bite was delightful.

name: Ritika Das
review: The Thai food here is top-notch. The green curry and sticky rice combo is a must-try.

name: Manoj Kulkarni
review: Visited during lunch hour. Despite the rush, the staff handled everything smoothly.
